race.description: Sale Racecourse Committee Of Management Mdn Plate
race.comment: URBAN CREED (6) was unplaced on debut then last start he did his best work late and finished third over 1717m at this track. Improving type who draws well and should be very hard to hold out. WHOLE LOTTA ZINO (12) showed good early speed last start on debut but felt the pinch late and finished fourth, beaten 2.75 lengths, over 1612m at Echuca. Better for that and gets every chance kicking up from the inside gate. IMPACTICAL (4) struggled at Cranbourne last time but had been coming along well prior and can bounce back. COLOUR CIRCLE (3) just missed at Bairnsdale and is in the each-way mix again.
